ex_breathing.text: Core breaths. Inhale wide through the nose, exhale hard through the mouth. Get your breath ready to work.

ex_catcow.text: Cat–cow. Round and arch through your spine — wake up your core before you load it.

ex_march.text: Standing marches. Quick, controlled knee drives. Get your heart rate moving.

ex_kneehug.text: Knee hugs. Draw one knee to your chest, control the release. Let your legs recover.

ex_childpose.text: Child's pose. Sink your hips back, breathe deep, let your heart rate settle.

ex_squat.text: Bodyweight squats. Sit back and down, chest up, drive through your heels to stand. Full range, every rep.

ex_splitsquat.text: Split squats. Front foot planted, back knee taps the floor, drive up through the front heel. Fast and controlled.

ex_jumplunge.text: Jump lunges. Explode up and switch legs in the air. Land soft, absorb through the hips, go again.

ex_pushup.text: Full push-ups. Full range — chest to the floor, press away hard. Keep your core tight the whole time.

ex_plyopushup.text: Explosive push-ups. Lower with control, then press explosively — hands leave the floor if you've got it. Reset and go again.

ex_plankfull.text: Forearm plank. Long line from head to heels. Brace your core like you're about to get punched.

ex_plankjacks.text: Plank jacks. Hold the plank, jump your feet wide and back. Keep your hips still — don't let them bounce.

ex_glutebridge.text: Glute bridges. Squeeze at the top like you're cracking a walnut with your glutes. Full lockout, every rep.

ex_bridgemarch.text: Bridge marches. Hold the bridge, drive one knee up, then the other — don't let your hips drop.

ex_singlebridge.text: Single-leg bridges. One foot planted, one leg long. Drive the hips up and hold the squeeze at the top.

ex_highknees.text: High knees. Drive your knees up fast, pump your arms. Stay light on your feet — this is your engine builder.

ex_squatjump.text: Squat jumps. Load deep, then explode straight up. Land soft and go right back down — no resting at the top.

ex_burpees.text: Burpees. Drop to a plank, chest to the floor, jump your feet in, explode up. All-out, full body.

ex_deadbug.text: Dead bug. Lower opposite arm and leg without letting your back arch off the floor. Slow and controlled.

ex_calfraise.text: Calf raises. Drive up onto your toes fast, control the lower. Feel it burn by the last few reps.

ex_standoblique.text: Standing oblique twists. Reach and crunch to the side hard — drive through your obliques, not your arms.

ex_birddog.text: Bird dog. Reach opposite arm and leg long, pause, squeeze your core, then switch. Control beats speed.

ex_mountainclimbers.text: Mountain climbers. Drive your knees to your chest fast, keep your hips low and core braced. Sprint it.

ex_bicyclecrunch.text: Bicycle crunches. Elbow to opposite knee, full rotation, no momentum from your neck. Make your abs do the work.

ex_skater.text: Skater jumps. Push off hard side to side, land soft on one leg, control the balance. Feel it in your outer hips.

preview.text: This is what a recorded cue sounds like.
